response.justification: Candidate brings valuable geospatial domain expertise (GISCollective, Green Map) directly applicable to routing systems, along with proven understanding of distributed systems and high-throughput performance optimization. However, the primary requirement—modern C++ development—is significantly weak, with only 20+ year old experience and a recent 15-year career focused on web development (TypeScript, Node.js). Would require substantial ramp-up on contemporary C++ and systems-level programming.
strengths: Deep geospatial domain expertise from 20+ years developing GIS platforms (GISCollective, Green Map) directly relevant to routing tile systems
Strong problem-solving methodology grounded in TDD, testing frameworks, and experimentation across multiple technical domains
Proven understanding of distributed systems and high-throughput optimization (millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby using low-latency patterns)
concerns: C++ experience is 20+ years old with no recent modern C++ work or systems programming visible in career progression
Recent 15-year career focused on web development (TypeScript, Node.js, Ember) rather than low-level systems or performance-critical programming
No explicit experience with routing optimization, navigation guidance systems, or data pipeline operations at the scale required
